title: Renderer Architecture & Resilience (revised)
consumer_purpose: Add crash isolation via ErrorBoundary, centralize duplicated constants, fix type declarations in the renderer app
claim_atoms: Constants centralized in packages/app/src/constants/index.ts (duplicated values only)
Routes wrapped with ErrorBoundary in app.tsx
Window.api types synced with ElectronAPI — missing methods added
Hardcoded port 4096 replaced with DEFAULT_PORT in entry.tsx
Hardcoded feedback URLs replaced with constants in error.tsx, home.tsx, layout.tsx
Storage key strings centralized in STORAGE_KEYS constant
content:
# Renderer Architecture & Resilience (Rev 2)

## Summary
Add crash isolation, centralize duplicated constants, fix type declarations. Focused scope — no ErrorFallback creation (reuse existing ErrorPage), no types/ipc.ts (deferred).

## Addressing Critic Feedback
- ✅ **Objection 1 (Premature constants hub)**: Scoped to ONLY duplicated values. DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL (3x), DEFAULT_PORT/DEFAULT_URL (2x in entry.tsx), STORAGE_KEYS (2 keys), TIMEOUTS for server-health (3 values that are truly duplicated pattern), CHANGELOG_URL (in highlights.tsx).
- ❌ **Objection 2 (types/ipc.ts)**: DEFERRED — types/agent.ts and types/mcp.ts already exist.
- ❌ **Objection 3 (ErrorFallback)**: REMOVED — reuse existing ErrorPage as ErrorBoundary fallback.

## Files to Create

### 1. packages/app/src/constants/index.ts
Central constants module with ONLY duplicated values:

```typescript
export const BASE_URL = "opencode.ai"
export const DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL = "https://opencode.ai/desktop-feedback"
export const CHANGELOG_URL = "https://opencode.ai/changelog.json"

export const DEFAULT_PORT = 4096
export const DEFAULT_URL = `http://localhost:${DEFAULT_PORT}`

export const TIMEOUTS = {
  SERVER_HEALTH: 3000,
  SERVER_HEALTH_RETRY_DELAY: 100,
  SERVER_HEALTH_CACHE_MS: 750,
  CONNECTION_RETRY_MS: 1000,
  POLL_INTERVAL_MS: 10000,
} as const

export const STORAGE_KEYS = {
  DEFAULT_SERVER_URL: "opencode.settings.dat:defaultServerUrl",
  LANGUAGE: "opencode.global.dat:language",
} as const
```

### 2. packages/app/src/components/error-boundary.tsx
SolidJS ErrorBoundary wrapper that:
- Wraps children in solid-js ErrorBoundary
- Captures errors to Sentry
- Passes retry callback
- Uses existing ErrorPage as fallback
- Minimal wrapper that doesn't duplicate ErrorPage

```tsx
import { ErrorBoundary } from "solid-js"
import * as Sentry from "@sentry/solid"
import type { JSX } from "solid-js"
import { ErrorPage } from "@/pages/error"

interface AppErrorBoundaryProps {
  children: JSX.Element
}

export function AppErrorBoundary(props: AppErrorBoundaryProps) {
  return (
    <ErrorBoundary
      fallback={(error) => {
        Sentry.captureException(error)
        return <ErrorPage error={error} />
      }}
    >
      {props.children}
    </ErrorBoundary>
  )
}
```

## Files to Modify

### 3. packages/app/src/app.tsx
- Import `AppErrorBoundary` and `STORAGE_KEYS` from constants
- Wrap each `<Route>` with `<AppErrorBoundary>`
- Add missing `Window.api` methods: `deleteCustomAgent`, `getMcpServers`, `setMcpServers`, `getDesktopPluginConfig`, `setDesktopPluginConfig`, `githubStartOAuth`, `githubOAuthCallback`, `recordFatalRendererError`, `checkUpdate`, `installUpdate`, `runUpdater`, `openPath`, `readClipboardImage`, `showNotification`, `relaunch`, `getZoomFactor`, `setZoomFactor`, `getPinchZoomEnabled`, `setPinchZoomEnabled`, `runDesktopMenuAction`, `loadingWindowComplete`, `setBackgroundColor`, `getDefaultServerUrl`, `setDefaultServerUrl`, `getWslConfig`, `setWslConfig`, `getDisplayBackend`, `setDisplayBackend`, `parseMarkdownCommand`, `checkAppExists`, `wslPath`, `resolveAppPath`, `storeGet`, `storeSet`, `storeDelete`, `storeClear`, `storeKeys`, `storeLength`, `getWindowCount`, `onSqliteMigrationProgress`, `onMenuCommand`, `onDeepLink`, `openDirectoryPicker`, `openFilePicker`, `saveFilePicker`, `getWindowFocused`, `setWindowFocus`, `showWindow`, `onPinchZoomEnabledChanged`, `onZoomFactorChanged`, `sessionExportData`, `sessionImportFile`, `githubGetToken`, `githubSetToken`, `githubClearToken`, `githubApiProxy`
- Fix types: use `AgentDef[]` instead of `unknown[]` for agent methods, `McpServerEntry[]` for MCP methods

### 4. packages/app/src/entry.tsx
- Import `DEFAULT_URL`, `DEFAULT_PORT`, `STORAGE_KEYS` from constants
- Replace `"http://localhost:4096"` with `DEFAULT_URL`
- Replace `"opencode.settings.dat:defaultServerUrl"` with `STORAGE_KEYS.DEFAULT_SERVER_URL`
- Replace `"https://opencode.ai/favicon-96x96-v3.png"` with `FAVICON_URL`
- Keep `hostname.includes("opencode.ai")` check — that's logic, not a constant

### 5. packages/app/src/pages/error.tsx
- Import `DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL` from constants
- Replace `"https://opencode.ai/desktop-feedback"` with `DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL`

### 6. packages/app/src/pages/home.tsx
- Import `DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL` from constants
- Replace `"https://opencode.ai/desktop-feedback"` with `DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL`

### 7. packages/app/src/pages/layout.tsx
- Import `DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL` from constants
- Replace `"https://opencode.ai/desktop-feedback"` with `DESKTOP_FEEDBACK_URL`

### 8. packages/app/src/context/highlights.tsx
- Import `CHANGELOG_URL` from constants
- Replace inline `CHANGELOG_URL` definition

### 9. packages/app/src/utils/server-health.ts
- Import `TIMEOUTS` from constants
- Replace inline timeout values

## What's NOT Changed (Deferred)
- i18n translation files — translatable strings, not code constants
- Test files — out of scope
- types/ipc.ts — deferred pending concrete spec
- ErrorFallback — removed, use existing ErrorPage
- Dialog-level ErrorBoundary wrapping — route-level covers it
- Layout dimensions — CSS/Tailwind values, not JS constants
- SAMPLE=4096 in files.ts — buffer size, not a port
- Cache limits in test files, layout resize thresholds

## Verification
- `bun typecheck` from packages/app — must pass
- No remaining hardcoded `"https://opencode.ai/desktop-feedback"` in app/src/ (grep verify)
revision_notes: Addressed 3 critic objections: (1) Scoped constants to only duplicated values, (2) Deferred types/ipc.ts, (3) Removed ErrorFallback — reuse existing ErrorPage. Added fuller Window.api type sync.
